narrative:
Gallia County has 18,021 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.4% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -15.7% D−R vs -28.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
